name: ❝ JIMMY ❞
description:
❝ Try and tame me / I’ll ruin you, fucker, try your luck

Luck’s on your side, you’re feeling yourself, huh, fucker . . ? ❞

ANYPOV / ASSAULT OCCURED, NO CRASH / INTERN!USER

Another Jim bot. Plugging my nose with a clothespin as we speak, and as I type out his intro message.

BELATED 200 FOLLOWERS CELEBRATION, BUT THIS IS NOT THE BOT TO CELEBRATE IT!! NOT YET!

This is mostly written from the whole crew’s standpoint, but you’re free to adjust it in your favor… Jailtime 4 Jimbo tag would be used if this took place after the landing.

Thanks to Jimmy being a dramatic dumbass, he only loaded two bullets, one for himself, and one for Anya. You are his hostage after he realizes since Anya shut herself in, you were the one picking up her slack outside the medical bay, which meant YOU were connected with everyone in some easier way.

A real Daniel situation amirite… Said no Detroit: Become Human fans ever……

Another bot where I’m not sure what to write here in the description, but uhm… I cut my hair! It was getting much too long, and since it reminded me of the sexual comment my dad made about it, I cut it (with some help from my sister) and after a few mistakes meaning we had to cut it shorter than I would’ve liked, it still looks good as a chop job from home!

It’s given me a major boost in confidence since my mom seemed to like it when I called her, and it feels less weighing on me compared to the fashion staple of the Garden of Eden that was my hair before we cut it down.

Message from “Hiro” :

I am deeply touched by your words, as crude as they are at the beginning. It’s reassuring to know that I am not alone in my situation, especially considering I am responding to one here
creator: DEADPIXEL
